resources.string: Tap the buttons to discover the gateway, auto-upload a log, write a local log, and refresh metrics on screen.
Use adb logcat with tag NeptuneSimulatorDemo to verify discovery, ingest upload, and write paths.

Clicks: 0
Health: ok=true capacity=16 size=0
Metrics: queuedRecords=0 droppedOverflow=0
Gateway discovery:
 status=not-run
Recent logs:
- none yet
